title: Update Miles depiction and ensure fight scenes use comic-style illustrations

requirements.text: Update the comic panel illustration assets so that Miles Morales is visually depicted as Black in any panel where he is shown (including panels where he is clearly visible, in shadow, or partially visible).
acceptanceCriteria: All relevant story panel images in `frontend/public/assets/generated/` depict Miles Morales as a Black character (e.g., facial features/skin tone/hair), consistent with the Spider-Verse comic style.
No image filenames referenced by the app change (the app continues to load the same `/assets/generated/spiderverse-panel-*.dim_1024x768.png` paths).

requirements.text: Ensure the fight/action scenes are represented with comic-style pictures (not blank/missing/placeholder visuals) by updating the existing fight-scene illustration assets to clearly read as comic panels with dynamic action composition.

quotes: the fight scene also needs to be with comic pictures]

acceptanceCriteria: Fight/action panels render an illustration (not missing) and the visuals clearly appear as comic art (inked outlines, stylized shading, comic motion/impact language).
Fight/action panels remain viewable in the Comic Viewer without layout breakage (image fits within the panel frame and scroll area as before).

requirements.text: Revise `illustrationAlt` strings in `frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts` for panels featuring Miles and for the fight/action panels so the alt text accurately describes the updated visuals in clear English.

quotes: miles is black and the fight scene also needs to be with comic pictures]

acceptanceCriteria: `illustrationAlt` entries for updated panels describe the visible scene accurately and remain in English.
No TypeScript errors are introduced in `frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts`.

constraints: Do not modify files under `frontend/src/components/ui` or any other paths listed as immutable in system context.
Do not change the illustration filenames referenced by `frontend/src/lib/comicData.ts`; update the underlying assets instead.
nonGoals: Adding new story panels or changing the story text/dialogue.
Implementing new backend functionality (no backend changes required for this request).
